title: Record soft50 tool5.5k and spec800 densify
prompt: Create reports/soft50-tool55k-spec800.md with sections for Soft 50, Tool 5.5k, Spec 800, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft50 Tool55k Spec800 Contract

## Soft 50
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.50 with quality bias floor 0.48 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 5.5k
tool result budgets default to 5500 chars with 100-char previews for denser reclaim

## Spec 800
speculative step buffer defaults to 800 tokens for earlier pre-turn compaction

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
